INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (now()), (now() - INTERVAL 5 DAY), (now() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH);
SELECT subtractInterval(dt, INTERVAL 10 DAY) FROM test_dates;
SELECT subtractInterval((INTERVAL 1 DAY, INTERVAL 2 MONTH), INTERVAL 15 DAY) FROM test_dates;
SELECT subtractInterval(INTERVAL 3 YEAR, INTERVAL 1 YEAR) AS result, subtractInterval(INTERVAL 6 MONTH, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AS month_result FROM test_dates;
SELECT subtractInterval(INTERVAL 1 WEEK, INTERVAL 1 DAY), subtractInterval(INTERVAL 7 DAY, INTERVAL 5 DAY) FROM (SELECT dt FROM test_dates);
SELECT dt, subtractInterval(dt, INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AS adjusted_time FROM test_dates WHERE dt > now() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH;
SELECT subtractInterval((INTERVAL 2 DAY, INTERVAL 3 WEEK), (INTERVAL 1 DAY, INTERVAL 2 WEEK)) FROM (SELECT dt FROM test_dates) WHERE dt = (SELECT max(dt) FROM test_dates);
WITH (SELECT dt FROM test_dates) AS subquery SELECT subtractInterval((INTERVAL 1 QUARTER, INTERVAL 10 DAY), INTERVAL 2 MONTH) FROM subquery;

SELECT subtractInterval(INTERVAL 1 YEAR, INTERVAL 2 DAY) AS result_1, subtractInterval((INTERVAL 3 MONTH, INTERVAL 1 DAY), INTERVAL 3 WEEK) AS result_2 FROM (SELECT dt FROM test_dates) WHERE dt < now();
